content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the left side but well within track bounds.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 42 + 5 = 47
Waypoint 47: (5.6300, 2.7696)
Car position: (6.3633, 2.5713)
Bearing = atan2(2.7696 - 2.5713, 5.6300 - 6.3633) = atan2(0.1983, -0.7333)
= 180 - atan2(0.1983, 0.7333) = 180 - 15.13° = 164.87°
Current heading: 142.28°
Delta = 164.87 - 142.28 = 22.59° → left (positive)
